plugins.name: rockstarr-content
plugins.description: Rockstarr AI long-form drafting plugin. Four publishing lanes (researched blog, thought leadership, email newsletter, LinkedIn newsletter) gated by the client's stack cadence, plus interview-driven case studies and repurposed derivatives. Every lane drafts in the client's approved voice from first-party knowledge base material; third-party sources are cited inline and listed in References, never paraphrased as the client's voice. Researched-blog lane (v0.4) runs an external WebSearch research phase at outline time, requires an FAQ section in the body, enforces inline [Source: URL] citations and a 13-item SEO/GEO quality checklist as Pass 1 before stop-slop. Thought-leadership lane (v0.3) runs the canonical TL rubric as Pass 1 before stop-slop. Monthly planning pass (ideate → pick → calendar → approve) then per-piece drafting on the calendar's schedule. Requires rockstarr-infra v0.8.2+ for the shared blog-seo-geo reference; v0.8.1+ for the TL rubric; v0.4+ for the rest.

plugins.name: rockstarr-infra
plugins.description: Rockstarr AI infrastructure plugin. Scaffolds the per-client folder, ingests the workbook, generates the style guide, runs the knowledge base, captures the tool stack, and exposes shared utilities every Rockstarr bot depends on. Ships the cross-bot approvals + urgent-reply layer (approvals-digest daily client-bound email, approvals-backlog-alert weekly strategist-bound email when the queue exceeds a configurable threshold, notify-reply-ready urgent client-bound email when an outreach reply lands) with scheduled tasks wired at scaffold time. v0.8.1 added the canonical thought-leadership rubric at skills/_shared/references/tl-rubric.md (consumed by rockstarr-content v0.3+); v0.8.2 adds the canonical blog SEO + GEO reference at skills/_shared/references/blog-seo-geo.md (consumed by rockstarr-content v0.4+) covering FAQ structure, keyword placement and density, internal linking rules, inline source URL convention, meta title and description specs, and the 13-item quality checklist that rockstarr-content's draft-blog runs as Pass 1 before stop-slop.

plugins.name: rockstarr-outreach-interceptly
plugins.description: Rockstarr AI LinkedIn outreach plugin for clients who run Interceptly. Owns the Interceptly integration end-to-end: account discovery, per-account persona capture, campaign lifecycle (draft, launch, pause, stop), multi-account session confirmation, the daily inbox + tasks loop, per-reply channel I/O (send, label, follow-up task, meeting proposal, booking), and outreach-side metrics + weekly reporting. Hands every inbound reply to rockstarr-reply for drafting and operator approval, then executes the returned bundle inside Interceptly. Exposes a daily-loop orchestration skill that scaffold-client wires to the schedule for background runs; in background mode, drafts are staged but never sent inline and the loop fires one urgent reply-ready email per run via rockstarr-infra:notify-reply-ready (>=0.8.0) when new reply drafts get staged.

plugins.name: rockstarr-outreach-salesnav
plugins.description: Rockstarr AI LinkedIn outreach plugin for clients who will not install Interceptly / MeetAlfred / Dripify / Waalaxy. Plans multi-touch campaigns against a client-supplied ICP and saved Sales Navigator search, executes the daily outreach loop directly in Sales Nav via Chrome MCP, and keeps all state in a single workbook inside /rockstarr-ai/. Enforces a 20/day + 100/week connection cap across campaigns, routes every reply through rockstarr-reply for approval, fires a single urgent client email per detect-replies run summarizing every newly-staged reply draft (via rockstarr-infra:notify-reply-ready), and confirms the browser is signed in to the correct LinkedIn before every run.

plugins.name: rockstarr-reply
plugins.description: Rockstarr AI channel-agnostic reply drafting for the Growth OS. Called by every rockstarr-outreach-* plugin to draft replies to inbound LinkedIn messages. Owns voice, classification, three-option non-ICP flow, stop-slop pass, and the 'send it' authorization gate. The caller owns the channel I/O. v0.2 wires the front-matter contract for rockstarr-infra v0.8 cross-bot notifications (notify-reply-ready + approvals-digest).
